title: Bystanders help rescue two in near drowning incident
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Bystanders came to the rescue of two people, a 30-year-old woman and a 12-year-old boy, who were involved in a near drowning incident on Friday 19 December at Diaz Beach in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Bystanders came to the rescue of two people, a 30-year-old woman and a 12-year-old boy, who were involved in a near drowning incident on Friday 19 December at Diaz Beach in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The woman and the boy are believed to be related."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI), the Mossel Bay NSRI Station 15 was alerted of the incident following eye-witness reports of a drowning in progress at the beach that evening.","html":"According to the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI), the Mossel Bay NSRI Station 15 was alerted of the incident following eye-witness reports of a drowning in progress at the beach that evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon the arrival of the NSRI and emergency medical services, the two had been rescued from the water by bystanders.","html":"Upon the arrival of the NSRI and emergency medical services, the two had been rescued from the water by bystanders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"They were both suffering non-fatal drowning symptoms,\" said Station 15 Operations Controller, Andre Fraser.","html":"\"They were both suffering non-fatal drowning symptoms,\" said Station 15 Operations Controller, Andre Fraser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NSRI rescue swimmers, the Western Cape Government Health Emergency Medical Services (EMS) as well as the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services responded to the scene.","html":"NSRI rescue swimmers, the Western Cape Government Health Emergency Medical Services (EMS) as well as the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services responded to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Fraser, the boy was in a stable condition and the woman in a serious but stable condition.","html":"According to Fraser, the boy was in a stable condition and the woman in a serious but stable condition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Both were transported to a hospital for further treatment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The NSRI has commended the bystanders on the beach for their efforts that helped in saving two lives.","html":"The NSRI has commended the bystanders on the beach for their efforts that helped in saving two lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Near drowning at Diaz Beach"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bystanders help rescue two in near drowning incident
